title: AI Operations Manager
office_cadence_note: Workable job API (togather, shortcode 2F80E415C5): workplace='hybrid', remote=false, location=London/England/GB. JD body states no explicit day-count, but the structured Workable field is 'hybrid' (not on-site/in-person). Treated as hybrid-light/flexible (OK). Confirm exact days at recruiter stage. Verified 2026-06-10.
working_week_note: RE-VERIFIED 2026-06-11 against the user's ACTUAL dealbreaker (weekend/6-7-day work only). Workable job API workplace='hybrid', remote=false; JD body has NO mention of weekends, Saturday, Sunday, or a 6/7-day week. Standard Mon-Fri hybrid week. FINE — NOT a dealbreaker.
key_evidence: Role centres on building agentic AI workflows (Zapier, Claude Cowork, n8n, prompt engineering) — directly maps to Ryan's Claude-Code agent-building spike (Aug 2023-present: competitor-intel + growth-experiment agents).

Requirements are soft: 'passion for agentic AI + hands-on building' and ONLY ONE of Salesforce admin / Zapier-n8n / prompt engineering / workflow automation. No hard degree, language, or visa blockers; UK role, UK auth fine.
Posting date confirmed May 6 2026 from Workable direct ATS (jobs.workable.com listing). 34 days = ~4.9 weeks, 4-8wk recency band (G=32) + low-applicant bump (first 25) +5 = 37.

NOT his domain sweet spot: events/hospitality platform, internal ops-automation, heavy Salesforce admin + commercial-ops (invoicing, supplier onboarding, SLAs) — adjacent to his founding-generalist profile but NOT crypto/Web3, community-led growth, or first-employee-scaling.
Reports to Operations Director (not founder) at a 50+ person founder-led company — recruiter/hiring-manager screen rather than founder-read; Workable apply only, no obvious warm path.
Manager title in the right seniority band; AI-automation is a domain he genuinely wants; flexible/hybrid London likely clears £50k.
biggest_lever: Lead with a built Claude Code / n8n agent artifact, not a CV — this role explicitly prizes hands-on agentic-AI builders, which is Ryan's rarest credible signal among generalist applicants.
biggest_risk: Role is half ops-automation builder, half Salesforce-admin / commercial-ops owner (invoicing, supplier onboarding, SLAs) — the process-rigor/enterprise-ops half is an anti-fit, and 5 weeks open means a shortlist may exist.
apply_verdict: Apply (mid-tier) — strong on the AI-builder half, weak on the Salesforce/ops-admin half; worth a tailored show-don't-tell application but not a top priority.
availability_note: Re-verified LIVE via Workable widget API (togather) 2026-06-10; shortcode 2F80E415C5 present, direct page HTTP200, published 2026-05-06, 35 days (still 4-8wk band). G held 37. callback_op unchanged 59.
momentum_signals: HEALTHY HEADCOUNT GROWTH: grown from ~40 to 70-79 employees (LinkedIn / Tracxn / Crunchbase), founder-led - steady expansion, not contracting.

ACTIVELY HIRING: 9 Togather jobs listed on Adzuna.co.uk (May 2026) incl this AI Operations Manager (Workable, posted 2026-05-06, 34 days old) - one of the freshest postings in batch, 'among first 25 applicants'.

FRESH AI-OPS SEAT (positive): the role itself is a new agentic-AI-workflow function (Zapier/Claude Cowork/n8n) - company is investing in AI tooling/automation, a growth/modernisation signal not a cost cut.

FUNDING IS OLDER (mild negative): $8.5M raise + rebrand Feast It->Togather May 2023; ~$17.9M total over 5 rounds, 40 investors. NO recent raise found - no fresh catalyst, mature marketplace rather than hot-momentum startup.
NO RED FLAGS: no layoffs/restructuring/down-round/founder-exit found in 2025-26 news searches. Established 2017, B2B+B2C marketplace, 1,500+ suppliers.
ROLE-CHURN: single clean Workable posting, no repost pattern observed.
operator_fit_note: PARTIAL - half is genuine Claude-Code/n8n agentic-workflow building (direct spike hit), half is Salesforce-admin / commercial-ops process rigor (not his spike); not founder-facing (reports to Ops Director).
momentum_note: Neutral-to-healthy. Steady headcount growth (40->~75), actively hiring (9 roles), and a fresh AI-ops investment seat - but funding is stale (2023, no recent raise) so no fundraising catalyst. No red flags. H=65. callback_v2 56 -> callback_v3 58.

signals: THIS SEAT LIVE BUT AGING / NO REPOST: Workable v3 API (togather, shortcode 2F80E415C5) confirms AI Operations Manager state='published', published 2026-05-06 (36 days), no later modification/repost. Still open and accepting but NOT recently refreshed — it is sitting on the board rather than being actively re-pushed. Verified 2026-06-11.

COMPANY IN HIGH-VELOCITY HIRING MODE (strongest current signal): 14 published roles on Workable, including TWO posted TODAY 2026-06-11 (Business Development Manager - Live Events; Event Partnerships Manager) and Event Producer posted 2026-06-01. Togather is demonstrably hiring actively right now — but the fresh velocity is in Commercial/Events, not this AI-ops seat.

AI/AUTOMATION COHORT (mild positive): AI Operations Manager was posted 2026-05-06 alongside sibling Operations Manager and Automation Manager (both same date) + a Senior Analytics Engineer (2026-05-14) — a small ops/automation cluster, suggesting the AI-ops function is a real investment, not a one-off, though none refreshed since.

NO FOUNDER/RECRUITER 'WE'RE HIRING' POST for THIS specific seat found (WebSearch surfaced only the live Workable + LinkedIn job listings, no dated social promotion). No recent funding catalyst (last raise 2023).

NET: company is unambiguously active (2 same-day posts), but THIS role is a 5-week-old unrefreshed listing — plausibly still open with a shortlist forming. Active-company signal strong; active-THIS-seat signal only moderate.
